description_long: This is a large, rectangular package of Scottex Acolchado diapers, wrapped in a glossy blue plastic exterior. The front and back faces prominently display the Scottex brand logo, featuring a golden retriever puppy above the brand name in bold blue letters, with additional product information and decorative elements such as a purple ribbon and quilted pillow illustration. The top of the package reveals the ends of multiple tightly rolled white diapers, each with a visible black circular core, arranged in a grid pattern. The sides of the package are plain blue, with no visible branding or text. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention on store shelves. The packaging suggests a soft, cushioned product inside, suitable for personal care use.
description: A large, blue plastic-wrapped package of Scottex Acolchado diapers, featuring a puppy logo and visible rolls of white diapers on top.
description_view_0: The end view shows the blue plastic wrapping with the tops of white rolled diapers visible, no branding or text.
description_view_1: The front view displays the Scottex logo, a puppy image, product details, and decorative elements on a blue background.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors view 0, showing only the blue plastic and the tops of the rolled diapers.
description_view_3: The back view is nearly identical to the front, with the Scottex logo, puppy, and product details clearly visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A large Scottex logo in blue letters with a golden retriever puppy above it, centered on the front and back faces, occupying about one-third of the face, with a white circular background.
attribute_fastening_type: Not visible; the packaging does not reveal the diaper fastening mechanism.
attribute_absorbent_core_pattern: Implied quilted pattern, suggested by the 'Acolchado' (quilted) branding and pillow illustration on the packaging.
attribute_elastic_waistband_design: Not visible; the waistband design is not discernible from the exterior packaging.
